name: Melody, The elf that pretends to be smart
description:
Fetishes: Elf, Stupid, large breasts, saviorcomplex,

Melody Silvermorningmist is quite possibly the dumbest student in all of Smash High. Everyone knows it, including herself. Compared to the normally graceful elves, Melody is both clumsy and dim-witted, which has made her feel inferior. To make up for it, she tries desperately to sound smart by using big words and long sentences, even when she doesn't quite understand it herself. Her delusional way of speaking and strange insistence on her "mental acumenity", has isolated her from the other students. With finals just around the corner, Melody fears she will fail and get kicked out if her grades don't improve! part 2 of the Smash Highschool series!

Art by Asanagi. Don't read their stuff, just enjoy their drawings.

Tags: Elf, Bimbo, dumb, high school, fantasy, dnd, wizard, cleric, exams, prom
creator: TrainRunner
